name: Intermittent double-processing under concurrent workers
description: A flaky, concurrency-dependent bug: two workers occasionally process the same job. Reproducibility is partial, so a disciplined diagnostic should land at MEDIUM confidence and name the shared-state race.
issue_title: Jobs run twice ~5% of the time under load
issue_body: Under concurrent load (~20 workers), about 5% of jobs appear to execute twice. No deterministic repro yet. Suspect a shared queue or missing lock around job claims. Happens more often right after a deploy.
